{{Quote|Further—think about this. With Captain Joshi dead and Provocateur destroyed, whom do you suppose is next in line for command of Implacable?|Warlord Zsinj to Garik Loran, who was impersonating Zurel Darillian|<ref name="WS" />}}
'''''Provocateur''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Joshi]]. In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] it was part of a task force lured into a [[Battle of Talasea|trap]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces in the [[Morobe system]]. During the battle [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Wraith Squadron]] delivered a barrage of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] across the ship's midsection, literally snapping it in half. Loss of atmosphere and further internal explosions killed any remaining crew members before New Republic rescue forces could arrive.

{{Ship-stub}}
